Rebuild of Evangelion

File:Sahaquiel demise (Rebuild).png|The 8th Angel turns black after its core is stabbed 
File:Sahaquiel's death cross (Rebuild).png|8th Angel's cross appears after its death 
File:Sahaquiel Aftermath (Rebuild) 01.png|8th Angel's blood covers the city.
